name: crewctl
description: CrewCtl — Zero-dependency Node.js orchestrator that runs your installed CLI coding agents (Codex, Claude, Gemini, OpenCode) as one operator-led team, with a live web command center.

scripts.test: node test/ui-smoke.test.js && node test/cli.test.js && node test/skills.test.js && node test/team-flow.test.js
